ddls:
CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location (e.g., fish farm, aquarium) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the location */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the location */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., pH sensor, water temperature sensor) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Location where the sensor is installed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance for the sensor */,
  "calibration_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of calibration in days */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the sensor (e.g., active, inactive, under maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "water_quality_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Location where the data was collected */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Sensor used to collect the data */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data collected (e.g., pH, water temperature) */,
  "data_value" REAL /* Value of the data */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was collected */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., sensor, manual input) */,
  "data_reliability" TEXT /* Reliability of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "collected_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who collected the data (if manual input) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_water_quality_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_water_quality_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "data_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reading */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Sensor used to collect the reading */,
  "data_value" REAL /* Value of the reading */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reading was collected */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the reading (e.g., sensor, manual input) */,
  "data_reliability" TEXT /* Reliability of the reading (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_readings_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* Data type used to trigger the alert */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Location where the alert was triggered */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "notification" TEXT /* Notification message for the alert */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was resolved */,
  "resolved_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who resolved the alert */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("data_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., staff member, researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User accessing the location or sensor */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Location being accessed */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Sensor being accessed */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "access_granted_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who granted access */,
  "access_granted_date" TEXT /* Date when access was granted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User generating the report */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Location being reported on */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data included in the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, finalized) */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* Users or teams the report is shared with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Report that includes the data point */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., pH, water temperature) */,
  "data_value" REAL /* Value of the data point */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., sensor, manual input) */,
  "data_reliability" TEXT /* Reliability of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_data_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_config" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration setting */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Sensor that the setting applies to */,
  "config_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration setting */,
  "config_value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration setting */,
  "config_date" TEXT /* Date when the configuration was set */,
  "configured_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who configured the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_config_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "calibration_data" (
  "calibration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calibration event */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Sensor being calibrated */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the calibration was performed */,
  "calibration_data" TEXT /* Data collected during the calibration */,
  "calibrated_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who performed the calibration */,
  "calibration_status" TEXT /* Status of the calibration (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calibration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calibration_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance event */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Sensor or equipment being maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the maintenance was performed */,
  "maintenance_description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance */,
  "maintained_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who performed the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)
